title: Auto AFK
description: Mod to turn off damage during afk
body:
# Mod to turn off damage during afk. ## The Fabric version requires the [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api). #### To change the config, you need to follow the path .minecraft/config/autoafk/config.json(default is 60 sec) #### OR #### If the mod version is 2.2.0 and higher, then you can configure it through the commands:
Commands - #### /afk (Switch to afk mode) - #### /afk setdelay {time} (Set delay to switch to afk mode) - #### /afk setsuffocating {true/false} (Set up choke protection) (Deprecated) - #### /afk setcollide {true/false} (Set up collision with mobs) (In versions higher than 1.2.4) - #### /afk setmobsaggression {true/false} (Set up protection against mob aggression) (In versions higher than 1.2.4) - *TRUE - Enable protection* - *FALSE - Disable protection*
